summary:
DIVINE CORRECTION AND PUBLIC APOLOGIES: Brandon issues a public apology for previously criticizing Donald Trump, explaining that the Holy Spirit sternly reprimanded him for publicly sharing details from their private spiritual conversations. Brandon acknowledges the growing influence of his platform and commits to better filtering his public statements, asking for grace as he navigates these responsibilities.

GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS AND TAIWAN: Brandon details a two-year window concerning United States relations with China and Taiwan. Brandon states that China intends to take Taiwan and describes visions of a panda turning its back on the Russia-Ukraine conflict to focus on the island alongside a dragon figure representing Kim Jong-un. Brandon recounts hearing Trump say the United States will not intervene because it only needs two years to manufacture its own microchips domestically in states like Texas and Arizona. Brandon also warns of a potential Pearl Harbor-style attack on Hawaii orchestrated by China as a midpoint in this conflict.

THE LIBERATION OF CUBA: Brandon predicts an imminent liberation of Cuba from its current regime, leading to unprecedented financial blessings and a massive spiritual revival. Brandon mentions the presence of the CIA and compares the impending covert operations to Jason Bourne scenarios and the Kennedy curse. Brandon emphasizes that proactive preparations are already being made by pastors in Miami to establish churches and hotels once the nation is freed.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND FUTURE LEADERS: Brandon shares visions regarding several American political figures. Brandon describes Marco Rubio as becoming highly polished and favored by the public, overshadowing Ron DeSantis, whom Brandon views as a mixed option. Brandon also highlights an African-American leader named Byron, foreseeing him receiving a divine anointing, rising to a vice-presidential level, and experiencing a season of restitution. Brandon urges prayer for these men, as well as for Mike Lindell, whose influence Brandon saw fading in a vision.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND INFRASTRUCTURE DISRUPTIONS: Brandon warns of a coordinated domestic attack akin to a Red Dawn scenario. Brandon details widespread disruptions involving cellular service jammers targeting AT&T, internet outages requiring Starlink, and attacks on power grids and substations. Brandon describes a crater from a bombed building similar to the Oklahoma City bombing, which will spark a massive wave of patriotism across the nation. Brandon also notes an impending crisis in the automotive market, specifically mentioning Ford needing massive government bailouts.

TIMELINES AND FUTURE COUPS: Brandon points to the year 2028, specifically the fall months around Rosh Hashanah, as a period of significant darkness and disruption, including a black shadow cast over the Los Angeles Summer Olympics. Brandon describes a vision of a five-star general in a Green Beret behaving like a mad hornet, orchestrating a 25th Amendment coup against Donald Trump. Additionally, Brandon mentions UFO sightings over Pikes Peak functioning as a deliberate distraction and references an ongoing global push involving Emmanuel Macron in France.

NATIONAL REVIVAL AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING: Brandon describes a forthcoming two-year spiritual revival coinciding with a rebirthing of America, which Brandon envisions as a healthy infant wrapped in a flag, contrasted with a less appealing vision of an infant representing Israel. Brandon notes that spiritual warfare will dismantle witchcraft strongholds in regions like Africa, Brazil, Venezuela, and Colombia, bringing a massive harvest before the darkness of 2028 arrives.
rawData: [May 16, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/9wgEbD964mI]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again today. I just want to tell y'all thank you for joining us and praying with us and being here so promptly. I'm going to go over some things from what the Lord showed us in this last video, but I want to say this right off the bat: I have to apologize. I was corrected by the Spirit of the Lord today. I went about last night, some of the things I said and how I criticized President Trump, and the Lord said I dishonored him. I want to say this: I apologize for my opinion and how I present myself and some of the things I say when I criticize him. Because of things that the Lord had talked to me privately about, I brought them up publicly, and there were things that I shouldn't have said. Me and Him, we have these conversations, but what we say doesn't mean it's for the public. Does that make sense? Like my wife and I have conversations we don't bring out in public; you just have private conversations. That's the way it is with the Lord. There are certain things I said about his voting and the past that I owe apologies for, and the Lord corrected me very sternly. He said, 'Brandon, the more your platform has influence and the more it grows, you're going to be held accountable more and more for what you say. You can't just flippantly say things out of your mouth. This is a public forum; there are millions of people watching.' So, for everybody in the government, I'm going to tell you this: I apologize for how I handle myself sometimes. You know what I'm learning? I'm growing and I am immature in how I handle some things. I just want to say that I ask you to overlook certain things. I'm growing—growing pains is what I want to call it. Was that anybody else telling me to say that? No, it was the Holy Spirit. He corrected me very sternly today. I was out letting my dog go to the bathroom, and the Lord corrected me. It was a very heavy correction. So, anytime the Lord corrects me to the strength that He did today, I want to always be quick to repent and make it right. I don't even know if I could make that right other than just say, 'Listen, I was wrong.' My opinion and the conversations I have with the Father just need to—I need to learn how to filter better. So, like I said, with all that being said, I pray for grace from all y'all. There was not even anybody who said anything. It was interesting; it was just from the Lord. But I'm always quick to make it right. Be quick to repent and turn from things when the Holy Spirit corrects you. In doing so, I've continued to do that. That's why I believe that if you keep a heart right before Him, He'll keep using you. Now, praying over President Trump's decisions and the council, when I heard him talking about Taiwan and China—can you make sure what's that beeping noise in the back? It's really loud. Do you hear the beep, beep, beep? When I heard in the meeting what was being said, President Trump confirmed what we heard in the Spirit 24 hours ago. He confirmed it today in the news. It was told that Xi Jinping asked him directly—the president of China asked him directly—'Will you stand in resistance if we take Taiwan?' and President Trump would not answer. And you're about to hear that. So, what did I hear? I heard that China was going to take Taiwan as we took Cuba in the days ahead. I saw the President liberating Cuba in the days ahead, and that there would be a financial blessing over Cuba for the first time in decades. They would liberate the tyrant government that has been over them, and Rubio will slay his tens of thousands and the chameleon will slay his thousands, and there will be jealousy between the two as one rises up in the polls and people say, 'We want him. We want David as our president next.' The one will be jealous of it and he'll have his thousands, but the one will have his tens of thousands. And I saw him becoming very polished in the days ahead, Rubio. And I saw an anointing on him, and I saw Byron, the black man that has the beard—I saw that God was putting an anointing on this man. And I saw the number 25%. The Lord said, 'There are things that need to be corrected, but it's not much. I will use this man in the days ahead.' Do you know who I'm talking about? You can show his picture if you want, but I saw Byron. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to touch his life.' I saw DeSantis was 50/50. He was not as good as what he portrays, but he was a 50/50 mix. And the Lord said Rubio was not; his heart was more pliable. And He said, 'Pray for these men. I saw them becoming the cabinet of the next administration.' That's what I was praying for. I saw the African-American man. People get mad and say, 'Brandon, you say racial things.' Listen, I'm just a Southern boy. I don't know nothing about trying to be racist. I love all colors. I love blacks, whites, Chinese, Asians—I love all of you. Brandon Biggs doesn't have racism in his bones. I love you. It's because I'm trying to be politically correct, trying to talk in front of hundreds of thousands of people, and I may butcher things. Then people say, 'Well, we're not African-Americans; we're just Africans.' Well, I'm ignorant, okay? So forgive me. But I do the best I can with what I know. I saw this man rise up like a vice president in the days ahead. I saw that there would be a strong pull for him—this man right here. And the Lord said, 'Pray for him.' And that's when I was talking about the restoration and the restitution of making wrongs right for a true African-American who is going to rise up. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to restore back what the cankerworm ate.' Obama had a white mama, but he's a true black man. And the Lord said, 'Watch what I do with this man.' And I saw a blessing on him. So you pray for him because with that target on you in the spirit realm, the enemy would try to derail it. The enemy knows what's being prophesied and he doesn't want him to succeed. So we're going to pray for him. We pray for a covering over that man Byron, just like how I told you about President Trump. God has him in the office, and the enemy does not want him to fulfill what God has called him to do. There's a covering over him, and He said he must make it across the finish line. There are things that God has appointed him to accomplish that have to be accomplished, and Cuba is one of them. The Lord said, 'I'm going to liberate the people.' And I saw old grandmas praying. They had prayer shawls. They looked like they were Catholic nuns. And they were weeping before the Lord as there was liberation coming to set the people of Cuba free. And the Lord said, 'In the days ahead, watch. Keep praying for what I'm about to do with Cuba.' Okay? And we keep bringing that up. We keep bringing it up, and I said, "It's coming." The Lord keeps—the visions are very colorful. They're very, very vibrant. That means they're getting closer and closer. There's something about to happen. This is why the Lord keeps having us pray for this. But I saw Taiwan; I saw a two-year window. Do you remember I told you that I heard President Trump say—and I don't know if this was his thoughts, and I don't want to be invasive, but I heard it—"All we need is two years. We don't need their chips. We'll make our own chips. We will create chips in America. All we need now is two years and we will develop our own chips." Do you have it? Yeah. I don't know if he said all that, but yeah. You said chips. "We don't need..." Yeah. Well, I didn't say it because I'm trying to be careful. Yes. So, I'm saying it today. So, I saw a two-year window. I saw a two-year window. And the Lord said, "Do they?" And so I saw why President Trump was trying to keep the dragon at bay, cracking his whip. Okay? I saw China cracking his whip. Like, "Listen," and then President Trump said, "We're 8,000 or 9,000 miles away. We're a long way." That's why I said, "Pray for Hawaii. Pray for Hawaii because I saw a Pearl Harbor event taking place in Hawaii by China. It was Midway, a mid-ground for our bases there to go off and try to protect. So as I saw that protection there, it was a two-year window—praying over a two-year window because the Trump administration—praying over his covering over him—it has about two and a half years left. So what we would have left of what I'm seeing, what we're praying over, is China taking it, but we would have our own chips. And that was him manufacturing here in America: Texas, probably Oklahoma, whatever in the southern states where we're not crazy like some of the Democratic states are charging so many taxes. So that's what we're trying to play or not because it's a distraction. Go ahead. Well, yeah. When I see it spinning, Trump wants to pull back and he'll start to focus on this. Oh, and I see Taiwan in the midst of it. I see Taiwan in the midst of it bartering pieces. Do you understand? Trump's going to make his own chips. Do you hear? Trump's going to make his own chips. We don't need Taiwan. That's what he... and I don't mean that trying to—Chapter 2: Find scriptures to stand on—I'm just telling you what I heard. I see it. We pray for the people of Taiwan. That's what we got to do. I'm just called to fear God, not man. So I got quiet because the Lord rebuked me right there and he said, "You fear me, not them." Because I was concerned about what Taiwan people would be saying because of what Trump had—about what he said. And so that's why I was correcting that because in my heart, I was thinking more about what they were thinking than the prophetic word of what the Lord was showing me, saying, "Trump, this is what Trump said: 'We don't need Taiwan. We have our own chips. All we need is two years. All we need is two years.'" And then I was more feeling about the people's feelings. And the Lord said, "Fear me, not them." And he corrected me. I'm just being real. That's what was going on right there. I got rebuked again right then. So the Lord showed us more about that. Now, this is what was said about Taiwan today and President Trump just had this meeting. Go ahead. But China made clear that Taiwan is very important to them. And after your first meeting here, President Xi's spokesman put out a statement to the media saying this: "The Taiwan question is the most important issue in China-US relations. If it is handled properly, the bilateral relationship will enjoy overall stability. Otherwise, the two countries will have clashes and even conflicts, putting the entire relationship in great jeopardy." You were still inside the meeting when that came out. That sounded almost like a threat. Was it communicated that way behind closed doors? No. And no, it wasn't. Not at all. But it has always been their most important issue. And it's not a takeover. They just don't want to see this place—we'll call it a place because nobody knows how to define it—but they don't want to see it go independent. They don't want to do it. And I think they probably would do something pretty harsh and then they would be met harshly and bad things will happen. So no, it's not that. We talked, by the way—last night we talked a whole night about that issue. I think I know more about Taiwan right now than I know about almost any country. He dominated the talk. It's always been his most important thing from the day I knew him years ago. I've known him now 11, 12 years. It's always been the biggest thing for him: Taiwan. Now with me, I don't think they'll do anything when I'm here. When I'm not here, I think they might, to be honest with you. So, I'm not sure that they do anything if it remained as is, but they have somebody there now that wants to go independent. Well, it's a risky thing when you go independent. You know, they're going independent because they want to get into a war and they want to—they figure they have the United States behind them. I'd like to see it stay the way it is. And I'll tell you something, I'll make a little news. I'd like to see everybody making chips over in Taiwan come to America because, to be honest with you, I think it's the greatest thing you can do because it's a heated situation. There's no question about it. And as you know, we have massive amounts of chip companies now from Taiwan already coming in. We expect to have 40 to 50% of the world chip business by the end of my term. And I think it should be even more than that. I think all of those chip companies—if they're smart, they're going to start heading to Arizona and the places where they're building. That's going to solve your problem. So do you see that? It's what we saw in the spirit. That was what I was seeing. And then they had the meeting and they had this interview, and this is what the Lord said: "We don't need Taiwan." That's what he was saying. "We have our own chips." And that was the whole reason why America was back in Taiwan. And they were moving into America. And that's why I said, "Pray for Taiwan," because I saw them being—I saw a mother hen bringing the island to her, trying to infiltrate South Korea through the politics, through North Korea, through the Philippines, through all of Japan, trying to bring them in like a mother hen. And that's why I warned you—how many times do you remember me saying this? They said, "Watch what China does." And I saw China turning their back on the Ukraine-Russia thing that's going on. And I saw—remember I said I see a panda bear? Then I saw a turtle. I saw a dove with a wounded chest. I saw two black crows. I saw a robin, and the robin had wounded the dove. The two black crows were standing there by the dove, and they were looking at the dove that was perished on the ground with its heart ripped out. And I said this is symbolic of people. And I saw the panda turn its back upon Russia and Ukraine, and I said he was gazing towards Taiwan, and it said, "It's our time. We want to take Taiwan now." And Xi Jinping is talking about it, and that's all they're talking about. That was three weeks ago, two weeks ago at the most. Maybe it was last week. And I said, "You're going to see an acceleration concerning Taiwan in the days ahead. Pray over Taiwan. Watch." And now this is all they're—"Are you going to stand in our way if we do this?" Okay. But I saw as we took Cuba and liberated Cuba and made them prosperous and blessed and got rid of the government they have and set up hotels and churches and blessing. That's why we are praying for certain pastors in Miami, because they are already setting up. They're already walking by faith. They know what's coming. I've talked to them on the phone; they already know what's coming. God is about to do something huge in Cuba. So you don't wait until it happens. You're not going to be reactive; you're proactive, right? So you're already getting your stuff ready because you know what God's about to do in this end-time move. You're not going to wait until it happens, because then you're already too late. You want to be the forerunners for the greatest move of God we've ever seen in this modern-day era. Watch what God is about to do with the greatest revival. Ladies and gentlemen, I'm just excited to be a part of it. Go ahead and play the video concerning Cuba. Did you find anything about that, son? Was the panda bear talking about that? Okay, this is the panda bear. When was that? April 30th, two weeks ago. The panda bear is devising a plan of its own with a box. The panda bear has a box and is looking over because he doesn't want you to see it. He has his head down and he's looking in the box, but he has a plan of his own. He's turning his back on Putin; he's turning his back on everyone else and has a plan by himself. The evil-looking panda is wrapped in their flag and it's talking to the dragon Kim Jong-un as they gaze upon Taiwan. Do you see? I said, 'Yeah, they gaze upon it.' Taiwan is glowing with yellow lights. And the panda is licking its lips. The panda is licking its lips—his big long tongue—and he's licking his lips. Well, praise the Lord. Father, we just praise you tonight for what you've shown us. Lord, we thank you that we will pray over this and continue to pray over this. That's when he stopped; that's why I stopped and started. Thank you, Lord. Right now, son, it's a good number. Always pray with me; there is so much more time. That's when it lifted, because I said they were licking their lips. They're about to try to take Taiwan and they'll use North Korea. He was talking to the dragon. Every single time I see over North Korea, it's that red dragon wrapped around there. It has tight claws down in those people. But that was before I saw the dove, the cardinal, the two black crows, and the turtle. The Lord said, 'Look at these.' It was symbolic of different people in Europe. So, let's see what they said about Cuba today. Do you have anything real quick? Okay, go ahead. Let's listen to Rubio real quick. We're trying to make it quick for y'all. 'In the case of Cuba, it is a very different situation. There is no economy in Cuba. To the extent there's any wealth in Cuba, it doesn't go to the people. It doesn't even go to the government. The wealth is controlled by a private company owned by military generals. They take all the money; they're sitting on billions of dollars. This is a country where people are literally now eating garbage from the streets, but they have a company that controls all of the money-making there. That's sitting on 15 to 16 billion dollars. So, it's a broken, non-functional economy and it's impossible to change it. I wish it were different, but I believe—it's my personal opinion—you cannot change the economic trajectory of Cuba as long as the people who are in charge of it now are in charge. That's what's going to have to change because these people have proven incapable. I hope I'm wrong. We'll give them a chance, but I don't think it's going to happen. I don't think we're going to be able to change the trajectory of Cuba as long as these people are in charge in that regime.' That's interesting. And then the CIA posted this. Now, there was more to what I saw about that and the boxes concerning where they raided the office and then him going to Cuba. After they raided the office, they went through it and the Lord said, 'Remember Kennedy? Remember Kennedy? The Kennedy curse? Remember Kennedy?' There was something so much darker to this and the Lord would not allow me to release it, especially publicly. I will say it like this: it's like Jason Bourne. Go ahead. You have video? No, it's not video; it's CIA pictures. They blurred out their faces. There are people there gardening. There are things going on. The CIA shows up right before, I believe, we invade. Something major is about to go down. And when it happens, we'll be on here live praying with you all. We'll pray for them. It's going to happen. I'm telling you, it's going to happen. I just believe with all my heart that God is about to do something major with this, and people are going to be upset about it. Everybody will say, 'Oh well, he's a war criminal' and all these things. But I'm telling you, it's about the revival. You're looking at something so small that you can see just on the news and what fake news is telling you, but the bottom line is it's about a liberation of a people to have a major revival. We're running out of time. You are still looking at your little plan of what you're going to do with your family—you're going to have a little house on the hill, a little cottage, maybe three or four kids, have a nice little car, your 401k. But I'm trying to tell you, Jesus Christ is coming. His main mission right now is to save that which was lost. And we're running out of time. Right now He's going into the places that have been secluded, where there are great strongholds of witchcraft. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to deal with the witchcraft. I'm going to deal with the witchcraft in Africa. I'm going to deal with the witchcraft in South America. I'm going to deal with it over Brazil, over Venezuela, Colombia, and so on and so on.' A major move of God is coming and a liberation of the people who have been bullied. God will use a wrecking ball like Trump to come in and wreak havoc—not just for finances and everything else, but the bottom line is it's about bringing in the harvest. And the Lord said, 'It won't be war in North Korea. I'm going to deal with Kim Jong-un himself and it will be like Pharaoh.' So get ready, because God is about to shake this world. We're out of time. And what's the most valuable thing to the Lord? Do you know how much money you have in the bank, how many zeros you have in your account? If you're a billionaire, if you're the richest person in the world? No, it's not; it's a tool. His main thing that He suffered and died for was souls—for you, for me—that none should perish but all come to repentance. What does God value the most? You and me, His kids. He did everything He could do to save that which was lost. But He doesn't send you to hell; you send yourself to hell when you don't accept Him as Lord and Savior. Unless a man is born again, he cannot enter into the Kingdom of God. Unless a woman is born again, she cannot enter into the Kingdom of God. But the Lord didn't send you to hell. You will send yourself to hell if you don't repent and turn from your wicked ways. There is a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. I say it over and over again because we're running out of time. I talked to somebody and they said they're getting to talk at the prayer meeting on Sunday, the 17th. They get to talk for two minutes and I said, 'What an opportunity!' Two minutes at the prayer breakfast, the prayer vigil, or whatever—the rededication with Trump. This individual gets to talk for two minutes. What are you going to say in that two-minute time to tell those masses of people, all those thousands and tens of thousands of people who show up for that? From the reporters all the way down, you have a two-minute thing. I remember Reinhard Bonnke. He went to an old disco back in the early '70s. There was a disco where he was holding a revival, and there were only adults at this revival. He said, "Where are the young people at?" And the guy said, "Let me take you to where all the young people are." He drove his car up to this place, and it was a disco; they were all in there jamming and having a good time. He said, "Oh no, all the young people are in the disco, and they're dancing and doing bad, immoral things." So he went to the guy that owns the disco and he said, "I'm a missionary from Germany and I have an important message I want to tell the people here." He asked for five minutes. The owner gave him five minutes. He said, "You can't do it tonight, but you come back tomorrow at midnight and you have five minutes." One guy wasn't going to let him talk, but the Holy Spirit worked on his heart. So that next night he walked into this disco, this club, and within those five minutes he spoke. The Holy Spirit fell so strong in there that there wasn't a dry eye in the whole building, and all of them gave their hearts to Jesus Christ in those five minutes when Reinhard Bonnke was speaking. The next time he went back to that place, there was a massive cross on the building, and they had closed down the disco and turned it into a church because everybody got born again and they sold it to a church. It just takes a moment for Jesus to touch your life. All he needs is five minutes. All he needs is two minutes with the right person behind those two minutes. Whenever you're speaking with the Holy Spirit, he will flood in within just a couple of seconds. All it takes is just one minute, one second for Jesus to turn and make your life totally different within just that moment of time. He can save you just by you saying, "Jesus, have mercy on me. I repent. Come into my life." How many seconds does that take? It doesn't take God much. We think it's going to take years for us to turn around, but all it takes is just one moment for the Holy Spirit to light and set your heart on fire for him. All it takes is just one second. Is this your one second right now, as we see the day approaching and we know the time is running out? Is this your one second? I say it again: unless a man is born again, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God. Last night, we had well over 71 people give their hearts to Jesus Christ. Tonight's your night. How many are here tonight and you tell me, "Brandon, I see all the things going on in the news and I'm at the end of my rope. I know I'm not living right. I've been backsliding. I'm living wrong. I'm sleeping around. I'm going to the strip clubs. I'm doing things that I know I should not be doing." But I know that tonight you're watching me on a Friday night and you're alone. You're needing some prayer. You're having depression, you're having anxiety, you're having all these things. I don't know what you're going through. You may be in self-harm mode, thinking, "I shouldn't live anymore." You're having these bad, evil thoughts, but it's not a coincidence that you clicked on me right now and you're here going, "Man, will you just pray for me?" Jesus can turn your life around on a dime. Jesus can turn your life around and take your situation and turn it from what the devil meant for bad. God will turn it around for good if you just give your life over to him and say, "Jesus, I surrender all to you." But he's a gentleman. That's what's amazing about him. Even whenever he corrects me, he says, "Hey, you missed it." He's not mean, but to whom much is given, much is required. So I go into all the world even tonight and preach the gospel and tell the people that Jesus Christ is coming. But if you're here tonight and you tell me, "Brandon, will you please pray for me? I'm having a real hard time right now. I'm strung out on drugs, porn, alcohol, or whatever. You may be strung out on meth." Weed's become legal, so people are smoking weed all the time and they're high all the time. Well, it's legal. Well, so is alcohol; you can stay drunk, too. And you walk around in a daze because you're just smoking dope all the time. You even drive high now; everybody is driving around high. You can smell it blowing out of their cars in Oklahoma. That's not a way to live. He died for you to live victoriously. He died for you to have your head held high. He died for you because he knows there's potential in you, and he knows that he has a greater future for you. He has a plan more than what you know of your past; he knows your future. And he knows every hair on your head. And he says, "Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health even as your soul prospers." The moment you confess him, the moment you surrender all to him, you're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost and he has a mansion built for you in glory and you'll spend eternity with him in paradise. The moment you confess him—am I saying it's easy to walk a Christian life all the time? No, but it's worth it. When you get real with God, God will get real with you. I'm not a religious person. Now, people will be saying, "I'm all into religion." Well, that's on you; that's fine. But it's not me. I'm into a relationship. I like sitting at his feet and talking to him because he'll tell you the secret things. He'll talk about sports, the weather, politics, and investments. "Hey, you do this and you'll make some money." Oh, he wouldn't do that? Yes, he does, but you're too small-minded. It's not your grandma's religion; it's called a relationship. So if that's talking to you tonight and you're telling me, "Brandon, will you please pray for me? Tonight's my night. I want to be born again. Tonight's my night. I don't want to go to hell. I know I've been living wrong. Will you just pray for me?" Jesus died for you publicly. I want you to be public about your decision tonight. I want you to put in the comment section right now, "I want to be saved." And if I'm talking to you, you tell me, "Brandon, pray for me. I need help. I can't keep living this way. My marriage is bad. My girlfriend broke up with me. My boyfriend broke up with me. Whatever. I'm having a really hard time right now. Will you just pray for me?" I'll pray for you, but you need to surrender all to Jesus. You need to give him all. Just say this simple prayer: "Jesus, I believe you are the Son of God. I believe you died for me and you rose again on the third day. Jesus, I'm a sinner and I need a Savior. Jesus, as of tonight, I repent for any idol worship. I repent for worshiping the devil. If there are some of you there who are Satanists: I repent. I denounce Satan. I denounce Buddha. I denounce Muhammad. I denounce whoever I may be worshiping, and I sell out to you, Jesus.
